About Me

Academic Journey

Currently pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering Core at SRM Institute of Science and Technology, KTR Campus, Chennai. My academic path is driven by an insatiable curiosity to understand how technology can transform lives and solve complex challenges. I'm deeply committed to leveraging computational thinking and data-driven approaches to create meaningful solutions that bridge the gap between innovation and real-world impact.

Currently Learning

C C++ Java Python JavaScript CSS Machine Learning

Future Vision

My ambition extends beyond simply mastering technology—I aspire to become a pioneering Computer Science and AI Engineer who creates transformative solutions. I envision myself at the intersection of artificial intelligence, data science, and practical application, building systems that don't just process information but genuinely enhance human capabilities and address societal challenges. Every project I undertake is a stepping stone toward this vision, combining technical excellence with purposeful innovation.

Web Development
AI Research
